text:
Ronald Chan Talks at the Distinguished Alumni Speaker Series
Twitter
Facebook
Weibo
Stern '02 alumnus Ronald Chan spoke at the Distinguished Alumni Speaker Series at NYU Shanghai on Thursday, November 12. A successful investor, entrepreneur, and published author, he talked about his career and life path following graduation from NYU, as well as his experience growing the capital and investment funds managed by his firm. Chan also talked about prioritizing tasks and time management, effective leadership, and his own thought-provoking insights on success.

text_blocks.text: Ronald Chan Talks at the Distinguished Alumni Speaker Series

Stern '02 alumnus Ronald Chan spoke at the Distinguished Alumni Speaker Series at NYU Shanghai on Thursday, November 12. A successful investor, entrepreneur, and published author, he talked about his career and life path following graduation from NYU, as well as his experience growing the capital and investment funds managed by his firm. Chan also talked about prioritizing tasks and time management, effective leadership, and his own thought-provoking insights on success.
